emergency_definition: total power loss in occupied site

BUSINESS HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Volt Masters Electric. How can we assist you today?
What brings you to call us today?
May I have your name and phone number, please?
I'm going to connect you with one of our electricians. Please hold for just a moment.
We are lining up the right electrician now and will stay with you.
Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Thank you for choosing Volt Masters Electric. Have a great day!

AFTER HOURS FLOW.prompt: Thank you for calling Volt Masters Electric. Our office is currently closed. How can we assist you?
What is the reason for your call?
Is this an emergency, such as a burning odor, smoking panel, total power loss, or sparking outlet?
I'm going to connect you with our on-call electrician. Can you please provide your name, phone number, and a brief description of the issue?
We are alerting the on-call electrician and they should expect callback in under 12 minutes.
I'm going to take some information and we'll schedule a callback for you during our next business day.
Thank you for calling Volt Masters Electric. We'll be in touch soon.

call_transfer_protocol.message_if_fails: We are lining up the right electrician now and will stay with you

fallback_protocol: We are alerting the on-call electrician and they should expect callback in under 12 minutes
tool_invocation_note: No tools will be mentioned during the conversation.
